/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Werror=format-security -Wextra -Winvalid-pch -fexceptions -Wall -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -fomit-frame-pointer -ffast-math -fno-finite-math-only -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/mpevent_module.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libmuse_mpevent_module.so -o libmuse_mpevent_module.so CMakeFiles/mpevent_module.dir/mpevent.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/muse-4.2/modules ../evdata/libmuse_evdata_module.so ../sysex_helper/libmuse_sysex_helper_module.so ../memory/libmuse_memory_module.so
